bundle.title: Expansion Catalyst — Contoso Enterprise Tier Upgrade

snapshot.opportunity: Contoso Ltd - Enterprise Tier Upgrade FY26

evidence.snippet: Contoso cited experimentation velocity as the primary reason for upgrading to Enterprise tier.
Their experimentation team has grown from 2 to 8 engineers in the past year, driving the need for Enterprise features.

notes: CSM confirmed experimentation usage grew 400% in last quarter
Customer requesting advanced targeting and mutual exclusion features

human_summary: Contoso is upgrading to Enterprise tier driven by experimentation team growth
Experimentation velocity cited as primary upgrade reason by customer success

because.claim: Customer explicitly cited experimentation velocity as upgrade driver
Experimentation team 4x growth creates genuine need for Enterprise features

assumptions: Expansion timeline holds for Q1 close

eic.opportunity: Contoso Ltd - Enterprise Tier Upgrade FY26
eic.summary_why_it_matters: Experimentation team growth and velocity are the primary drivers for Enterprise tier upgrade.
